title: P&S Variated Item Pack
description: Makes various Items with Variants to have unique textures
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/NkZbzInG4BQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Texture Variants

![Firework Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0128b3a60b88b83747d4d577ab549787939b2f96.png)

This Resource Pack Gives lots of Items with it's type unique textures

![Banner Pattern Extended View](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b0f1a997d1fe433b9f03fceb6eba0552a9dab3b.png)

Additionally, You can install additional Extended View Addon to see Extended view of certain items by Using Shift key and reveal more info. 

![Items With Icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2dc896cd20ea6ceca509d496426a49b6b84abcbe.png)

Items that hard to distinguish like Waxed Copper Blocks, Infested Blocks, Trapped chest have small Icon to identify.

## List of Item Variations

- Name Tags (jeb_, Dinnerbone, Grumm, deadmau5, Johnny, Toast)
- Paintings
- Exploler Maps
- Ominous Bottle
  - Consume Animations
- Potion, Splash Potion, Lingerling Potion, Tipped Arrow
  - Potency/Legnth
  - Consume Animations
  - Unique Akward Potion
- Crossbow Contents
- Loadstone Compass
- Goat Horn
- Item Cooldown
  - Wind Charge
  - Ender Pearl
  - Chorus Fruit
    - Consume Animations
  - Goat Horn
  - Sheild Disabled
- Waxed coppers, Infested Stones, petrified oak slab, suspicious sand&gravel, trapped chest additional Icon.
- Bundles with bundle/item with Max Stack Size 16, Max Stack Size 1
- Apple, Golden Apple, Enchanted Golden Apple
  - Consume Animations
- Unique Armor Trim Icons
- Banner Pattern with trims according to it's item grades
- Enchanted Book
  - Level
  - Curse, Treasure, Normal
  - Enchant Type
  - Anvil Use Count
- Written Book
  - Author
  - Name
  - Generation
  - Page count (0-9, 10-19 ... 90-99, 100)
  - resolved
- Fish Buckets (same as fish bucket variants resource pack https://modrinth.com/project/FPVlWX0t )
- Firework Rockets and Firework Stars
  - Flight Duration (0~4 with command, 1~3 in survival)
  - Explosion type (small, large, star, creeper, burst, no firework star)
  - Explosion count (0~7)
  - Trail/Twinkle Effects
  - Flying Firework without wick
  - Colors for rocket with one firework star

## List of Extended View Addon

- Pottery sherd
- Banner Pattern
- Smithing Template
- Paintings
- Potions
- Food with Effect
- Armor 3D render
- Anvil use count
- Enchanted Book Type

## Item Use/Selection Animation

- Shears Open/Close
- Totem Of Undying in Offhand becoms translucent
- Music Disc in hand/ground/item frame becoms circular
- key item holding/using position change
